name: circumpunct-ethics
description: Ethical reasoning, virtue diagnostics, and Noble Lie detection based on the Circumpunct Framework. Four pillars (Good, Right, True, Agreement) kept alive by four virtues (Plasticity, Access, Curiosity, Validation). Includes the Noble Lie cognitive virus model with truth gate analysis, two-channel love theory (functional vs. resonant), installation depth spectrum, discourse analysis at any scale (interpersonal to institutional to public media), commercialized Noble Lie detection, steelman construction, and a restoration protocol for recovering frozen perception. Demonstrated capability includes formal narcissism research, academic discourse analysis, and applied case studies analyzing sustained public content patterns. Serves as a perceptual calibration tool for both humans and AI: the cognitive virus transmits through language, which means AI systems trained on human text inherit the same performed-ethics patterns and benefit from the same diagnostic framework. Created by Ashman Roonz.
